attacking_style: Specialized in short, technical time trials under 10km where cornering precision and bike handling on suboptimal surfaces matter more than sustained power.
team_tactics: EF provides strong TT equipment and preparation for technical parcours, enabling riders to excel on courses requiring precision over pure watts.
terrain_preference: Short technical TTs (9km range) with dusty roads and frequent corners; excels where bike handling and risk-taking in corners create advantages over pure power specialists.
vulnerability: Insufficient data, but likely vulnerable in longer TTs where sustained power trumps technical skills, and against pure time trial specialists on cleaner courses.
key_patterns: Defeats pure power specialists like Ganna on technical courses requiring cornering precision.
EF team consistently performs above expectations in short technical TTs with challenging surfaces.
Holds form advantage late in short TTs, maintaining speed through final technical sections.
form_trajectory: unknown: only single race observation from early 2022, insufficient data for trajectory assessment
